# Master spec § 22 — Master Bootstrap Verification (Operational Grid)

Six checks that gate sovereign-os into the master spec lock-state. Run by sovereign-osctl bootstrap verify on a LIVE node. --strict mode promotes SKIPs to FAILs; default mode keeps SKIPs informational (allows running in CI without real SAIN-01 hardware).

This doc is regenerated from `config/bootstrap/verify-grid.yaml` on every invocation of `scripts/bootstrap/lib/render-verify-grid-md.py`. The same YAML drives the metadata table in `scripts/bootstrap/verify.sh` via `lib/load-verify-grid.py`, so the doc and the live verifier can never drift on check IDs / names / spec citations.

## Check inventory

| ID | Name | Master spec | Skips when |
|----|------|-------------|------------|
| 01 | Microcode / ISA | § 22.1 + § 1.1 | /proc/cpuinfo not readable |
| 02 | Bus Geometry | § 22.2 + § 1.2 | lspci not installed or LnkSta unreadable (needs root on real hw) |
| 03 | Linux Memory (ZFS ARC) | § 22.3 + § 3.2 | ZFS not loaded (no arcstat + no /proc/spl/kstat/zfs/arcstats) |
| 04 | Driver Fabric (NVIDIA) | § 22.4 + § 4.3 | modinfo not installed or nvidia module not loaded |
| 05 | Security Core (Tetragon) | § 22.5 + § 5 | tetragon dir (/var/run/tetragon) doesn't exist |
| 06 | Network Line (Jumbo MTU) | § 22.6 + § 8.1 | ip(8) not installed or interface not present on host |

## Check 01 — Microcode / ISA

- **Master spec:** § 22.1 + § 1.1
- **Checks:** avx512_vnni + avx512_bf16 flags present in /proc/cpuinfo
- **Skip condition:** /proc/cpuinfo not readable
- **Tools required:** *(none — uses /proc or filesystem reads)*

## Check 02 — Bus Geometry

- **Master spec:** § 22.2 + § 1.2
- **Checks:** ≥2 PCIe slots at Width x8 + ≥2 at Gen 4/5 speed
- **Skip condition:** lspci not installed or LnkSta unreadable (needs root on real hw)
- **Tools required:** `lspci`

## Check 03 — Linux Memory (ZFS ARC)

- **Master spec:** § 22.3 + § 3.2
- **Checks:** arc c_max equals BOOTSTRAP_VERIFY_ARC_MAX_BYTES (128 GiB target)
- **Skip condition:** ZFS not loaded (no arcstat + no /proc/spl/kstat/zfs/arcstats)
- **Tools required:** *(none — uses /proc or filesystem reads)*

## Check 04 — Driver Fabric (NVIDIA)

- **Master spec:** § 22.4 + § 4.3
- **Checks:** nvidia kernel module license is MIT/GPL/Dual (open module, NOT proprietary)
- **Skip condition:** modinfo not installed or nvidia module not loaded
- **Tools required:** `modinfo`

## Check 05 — Security Core (Tetragon)

- **Master spec:** § 22.5 + § 5
- **Checks:** /var/run/tetragon/tetragon.events present (socket / pipe / file)
- **Skip condition:** tetragon dir (/var/run/tetragon) doesn't exist
- **Tools required:** *(none — uses /proc or filesystem reads)*

## Check 06 — Network Line (Jumbo MTU)

- **Master spec:** § 22.6 + § 8.1
- **Checks:** data-plane interface ($BOOTSTRAP_VERIFY_DATA_IFACE, default enp5s0) MTU=9000
- **Skip condition:** ip(8) not installed or interface not present on host
- **Tools required:** `ip`

## Cross-references

- `config/bootstrap/verify-grid.yaml` — canonical metadata source
- `scripts/bootstrap/verify.sh` — the executor (per-check bash bodies)
- `sovereign-osctl bootstrap verify [--only IDS] [--strict] [--json]` — operator surface
- `sovereign-osctl bootstrap phases` — companion inventory of master spec § 12 5-phase artifacts
